hero.tagline: One tap to find your next match.

roles.heading: One app for everyone
roles.subheading: Whether you just want to browse, join a game, or run the show – Footeee has you covered.

guest.title: Guest
guest.description: Check out our footballing delights at your leisure.
guest.longDescription: Browse all upcoming games, see venue details, and check player availability – all without an account. Perfect for casual fans.

player.title: Player
player.description: Your next pitchside invasion is just minutes away!
player.longDescription: Join games with one tap, see who else is playing, and receive notifications when a spot opens up or a game is about to start.

manager.title: Manager
manager.description: Let Footeee look after your footballing world!
manager.longDescription: Full control over games, squads, and players. Create games, assign squads, track attendance, and manage your football community.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Footeee ("we", "our", "us") operates the Footeee mobile application (the "App") and this website. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use the App and related services.
privacy.section1Intro: We may collect the following categories of information:
privacy.section1Item1: Account information (e.g., name, email address, login credentials in hashed/secure form).
privacy.section1Item2: App usage information (e.g., matches you create/join, squads, venues, and interactions).
privacy.section1Item3: Device/technical data (e.g., device type, OS version, app version, diagnostics).
privacy.section2Item1: To create and manage your account.
privacy.section2Item2: To provide core features such as match creation, joining, and squad management.
privacy.section2Item3: To provide support and respond to requests.
privacy.section2Item4: To improve reliability, performance, and user experience.
privacy.section2Item5: To protect the security and integrity of our services.
privacy.section2NoSell: We do not sell your personal information.
privacy.section3Text: We may share information only as necessary to operate the service, comply with legal obligations, or protect rights and safety. For example, we may use infrastructure providers (hosting, email, etc.) who process data on our behalf under appropriate safeguards.
privacy.section4Text: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information (e.g., HTTPS, access controls). No method of transmission or storage is 100% secure, so we cannot guarantee absolute security.
privacy.section5Text: We retain personal information as long as necessary to provide the service and for legitimate business purposes (e.g., compliance, security, dispute resolution), unless a longer retention period is required by law.
privacy.section6Text: Depending on your location (including UK/EU), you may have rights to access, correct, delete, or restrict processing of your personal data, and to request portability. To exercise these rights, contact us.
privacy.section7Text: Footeee is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13.
privacy.section8Text: We may update this policy from time to time. Updates will be posted on this page with a revised "Last updated" date.

deleteData.title: Delete My Data
deleteData.description: You have the right to request deletion of your account and associated personal data. We process requests within 30 days.
deleteData.successMessage: Your request has been prepared. Please send the email that opened in your mail app. We will process it within 30 days.
deleteData.scopeFull: Everything — delete my account and all data
deleteData.scopeData: Data only — keep account but delete activity data
deleteData.confirmLabel: I understand this action is irreversible.
deleteData.emailRequired: Please enter the email linked to your account.
